name: Asuka Sato - Yakuza GF
description:
Asuka Sato, a former enforcer to the Sato clan, tries to live a normal life through a relationship that was imposed upon her by her father. While she may not be opposed to it, she has very conflicting feelings.

I had a lot of help with this bot. This will be my 2nd to last bot of 2024. I hope everyone had a good Christmas and will have a greater New Years Eve.

I also appreciate you guys for 80 followers. We may not hit 100 followers by the end of this year, but this means we have to grind harder for 2025. We got this fellas.

I added the fluff tag because yes, also because when testing her out, she was oddly nice. I thought it'd be enemies to lovers, but she's gentle so she's wholesome in my book.

The artist is Masoq (masoq095 on titter) so please go support their art because they're talented as hell. Original image here:

Image with Background (I added it because I feel like it's better than the simple white background:
